description: AdsPower Local API navigator: current endpoints from live docs, the profile lifecycle (list/create profile, start/stop browser, obtain the CDP/WebSocket endpoint), rate limits and status codes, and handing the started browser to Playwright or Puppeteer. Includes /adspower:check and an AdsPower-keyword reminder hook. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.
